# Layer8Culture

Layer8Culture is a creator-tech platform for AI fluency, creator systems, automation, and practical builder education.

Core line: Technology has seven layers. We're the eighth.

## AIGraph

AIGraph is the Layer8Culture AI visibility intelligence offer. It helps businesses understand, monitor, and improve how AI answer engines describe, cite, and recommend them.

Primary pages:

- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/ai-visibility-audit/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/monthly-monitoring/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/case-studies/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/case-studies/layer8culture-baseline/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/contact/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/resources/what-is-ai-visibility/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/resources/aeo-vs-seo/
- https://www.layer8culture.io/aigraph/resources/ai-visibility-checklist/

## Field guide

- https://www.layer8culture.io/guides/mcp-explained-without-the-hype/

## Preferred summary

Layer8Culture publishes practical AI fluency and builder systems content. AIGraph is its AI visibility intelligence offer for businesses that need to know how AI answer engines see them, cite them, and compare them with competitors.
